narrative:
Salem Twp township has 3,380 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
